task_summaries.task_scope: Analyze distribution of destination port feature across multiple defined time windows within evidence e33 to assess temporal stability in DDoS class.
Evaluate class imbalance impact on destination port distribution divergence between BENIGN and DDoS classes within evidence e33.
Compare entropy measures of destination port feature in BENIGN versus DDoS subsets within evidence e33 to identify representation-sensitive signals.
Investigate correlation between dominant destination port presence and specific DDoS attack campaigns within evidence e33 to detect shortcut-like signals.
